response.justification: Bogdan brings over a decade of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like Docker and AWS CDK, directly aligning with the role’s stack and responsibilities; his hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work and open-source leadership further demonstrate architectural maturity and cross-domain adaptability.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven AI-agent and tooling development experience
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic in a Berlin-based role
Very broad historical stack may raise questions about depth in current priorities
